skills.name: Respira Setup Assistant
skills.description: Diagnose your Respira MCP connection, walk through first-time setup, and fix common connection problems (timeouts, 401s, 403s, version mismatches).
skills.author: Respira for WordPress

details.hero_subtitle: Diagnose your MCP connection, walk through first-time setup, and fix common problems. Works even when Respira is broken — it is the skill you run first.

capabilities.title: Doctor Diagnostics
capabilities.desc: 9 checks in one pass — Node.js version, MCP config, connectivity, plugin version, API negotiation, and npm update availability.

capabilities.title: Version Compatibility
capabilities.desc: Detects version mismatches between MCP server and plugin. Tells you exactly what to update and why.

capabilities.title: Guided Setup
capabilities.desc: Walks through first-time connection step by step — plugin install, API key creation, MCP configuration.

capabilities.title: Troubleshooting
capabilities.desc: Resolves timeouts, 401s, 403s, staging auth issues, and REST API blocks with plain-language instructions.

skills.name: Site Onboarding
skills.description: First-run primer for AI coding tools. Verifies MCP connectivity, discovers site architecture (theme, builders, plugins, content types), maps all available capabilities, and produces a site briefing.
skills.author: Respira for WordPress

details.hero_subtitle: First-run primer for AI coding tools. Verify your MCP connection, discover your site architecture, and get a complete briefing on everything your AI agent can do.

capabilities.title: Connection Verification
capabilities.desc: Confirms MCP is live, authenticated, and communicating with your WordPress site before doing anything else.

capabilities.title: Architecture Discovery
capabilities.desc: Maps your theme, page builders, plugins, post types, taxonomies, and menus in a single pass.

capabilities.title: Capability Mapping
capabilities.desc: Lists every action the AI can take on your specific site based on active plugins and add-ons.

capabilities.title: Site Briefing
capabilities.desc: Produces a concise reference document with connection status, architecture, and suggested next steps.

skills.name: WordPress Site DNA
skills.description: Archaeological analysis of WordPress sites. Detects all page builders, audits plugins (active vs dead weight), maps content structure, finds orphaned shortcodes, measures performance, and assesses security posture.
skills.author: Respira for WordPress

details.hero_subtitle: Archaeological analysis of your WordPress installation. Find technical debt, optimization opportunities, and hidden issues — in about 60 seconds.

capabilities.title: Core WordPress Health
capabilities.desc: Version, PHP compatibility, debug mode, memory limits

capabilities.title: Builder Archaeology
capabilities.desc: Detect all builders: Elementor, Divi, Bricks, WPBakery, and 7 more

capabilities.title: Plugin Analysis
capabilities.desc: Active vs dead weight, outdated, security risks, performance hogs

capabilities.title: Theme Inspection
capabilities.desc: Active theme, parent/child structure, framework detection

capabilities.title: Content Structure
capabilities.desc: Orphaned shortcodes, media library, database bloat

capabilities.title: Performance Metrics
capabilities.desc: Page weight, unused assets, image optimization opportunities

capabilities.title: Security Posture
capabilities.desc: SSL, admin exposure, file permissions, vulnerability scan

capabilities.title: Technical Debt Score
capabilities.desc: Health score 0–100 with category breakdown and trend tracking

expected_findings: 3 page builders installed, only actively using 1
14 plugins you forgot about that slow every page load
Orphaned shortcodes breaking layout on 8 pages
PHP 7.4 running end-of-life with known vulnerabilities
as your WordPress username (a gift to attackers)
2.3GB of unoptimized images killing Core Web Vitals

skills.name: Technical Debt Audit
skills.description: Identifies technical debt in WordPress sites — orphaned shortcodes from deleted plugins, unused plugins, database bloat, unused media, builder data from inactive builders.
skills.author: Respira for WordPress

details.hero_subtitle: Orphaned shortcodes, forgotten plugins, database bloat, unused media. Technical Debt Audit finds it all and gives you a safe, prioritized cleanup plan.

capabilities.title: Orphaned Shortcodes
capabilities.desc: Finds shortcodes in content pointing to deleted or inactive plugins

capabilities.title: Plugin Graveyard
capabilities.desc: Identifies plugins installed but never used, activated then abandoned

capabilities.title: Builder Archaeology
capabilities.desc: Dormant page builders with zero pages using them, still bloating disk

capabilities.title: Database Bloat
capabilities.desc: Revisions, expired transients, orphaned postmeta, spam comment backlog

capabilities.title: Unused Media
capabilities.desc: Images uploaded but referenced nowhere — wasted disk and bandwidth

capabilities.title: Long Inactive Plugins
capabilities.desc: Plugins deactivated 6+ months ago that are attack surface for nothing

capabilities.title: Debt Score 0–100
capabilities.desc: Composite cleanliness score with breakdown by category

capabilities.title: Safe Cleanup Roadmap
capabilities.desc: Prioritized week-by-week plan with Respira duplicate-first workflows

expected_findings: 23 orphaned shortcodes breaking layout across 8 pages
14 plugins installed
— never activated, never removed
Elementor and Divi both installed, only one ever used
2.1GB of database bloat from 8 years of unlimited revisions
800+ images in the media library, only 200 referenced anywhere
Deactivated security plugin still sitting there with known CVEs

skills.name: WooCommerce Health Check
skills.description: WooCommerce configuration diagnostics — identifies checkout problems, cart errors, AJAX mismatches, caching issues, payment gateway setup, SSL enforcement. Revenue-impacting diagnostics.
skills.author: Respira for WordPress

details.hero_subtitle: URL mismatches, uncached cart pages, broken payment gateways. WooCommerce Health Check finds the exact issues causing cart abandonment — before your next lost order.

capabilities.title: URL Mismatch Detection
capabilities.desc: WordPress Address vs Site Address mismatch breaks AJAX on checkout

capabilities.title: SSL Verification
capabilities.desc: HTTP store detected — payment gateways require HTTPS

capabilities.title: Cart & Checkout Pages
capabilities.desc: Verifies pages exist, are published, and assigned in WooCommerce settings

capabilities.title: Caching Exclusions
capabilities.desc: Cart and checkout cached = sessions broken, empty carts, lost orders

capabilities.title: Payment Gateways
capabilities.desc: Detects active gateways, flags inactive plugins, SSL requirements

capabilities.title: Mobile Checkout
capabilities.desc: Column stacking, tap targets, Place Order button off-screen

capabilities.title: Checkout Performance
capabilities.desc: Load time, unnecessary scripts, JS blocking payment forms

capabilities.title: Health Score 0–100
capabilities.desc: Store-specific score with immediate action items by revenue impact

expected_findings: WordPress Address and Site Address don\
WP Rocket caching cart and checkout — customers lose their cart every page reload
SSL expired last week — Stripe and PayPal refuse to process payments
Place Order
WooCommerce Stripe plugin installed but deactivated — no payment method available
Checkout page loads 4.2 seconds — 40% of mobile users abandon before it renders

skills.name: Mobile Experience Report
skills.description: Mobile layout diagnostics — identifies responsive breakpoint problems, text sizing issues, column stacking failures, element visibility issues, navigation menu behavior. Device-by-device breakdown.
skills.author: Respira for WordPress

details.hero_subtitle: 60% of your visitors are on phones. This skill shows you exactly what they experience — broken columns, squished text, menus that don't work on touch.

capabilities.title: Breakpoint Analysis
capabilities.desc: Tests all device sizes from 320px iPhone SE to 1024px tablet landscape

capabilities.title: Column Stacking
capabilities.desc: Finds multi-column layouts that squish side-by-side on phones

capabilities.title: Typography Scaling
capabilities.desc: Catches 72px headings that eat the entire mobile screen

capabilities.title: Horizontal Scroll
capabilities.desc: Detects elements wider than the viewport causing sideways scrolling

capabilities.title: Mobile Navigation
capabilities.desc: Verifies hamburger menu, tap targets ≥ 44px, touch-friendly dropdowns

capabilities.title: Media Responsiveness
capabilities.desc: Images, videos, maps — flags anything without max-width: 100%

capabilities.title: Spacing on Mobile
capabilities.desc: 80px desktop padding that wastes the entire phone viewport

capabilities.title: Mobile Score 0–100
capabilities.desc: Composite score with per-page breakdown and fix priority roadmap

expected_findings: Three-column hero squished into tiny slivers on every phone
72px H1 headings that take the full screen on iPhone SE
Hamburger menu never configured — desktop menu on mobile
Place Order
80px section padding eating 160px of mobile viewport real estate
Videos and embedded maps with no responsive wrappers

skills.name: SEO & AEO Amplifier
skills.description: Comprehensive on-page SEO and Answer Engine Optimization audit with automated duplicate creation and intelligent schema markup generation.
skills.author: Respira for WordPress

details.hero_subtitle: Comprehensive on-page SEO and Answer Engine Optimization for WordPress. Scan everything, detect high-impact gaps, and auto-create optimized duplicates for safe review.

capabilities.title: Comprehensive SEO Audit
capabilities.desc: Scans all pages and posts for title/meta issues, heading problems, missing alt text, thin content, weak slugs, and internal link gaps.

capabilities.title: AEO Opportunity Detection
capabilities.desc: Finds answer-engine opportunities including FAQ/HowTo patterns, snippet candidates, and People Also Ask structuring gaps.

capabilities.title: Schema Markup Generation
capabilities.desc: Builds intelligent JSON-LD for Article, FAQ, HowTo, Product, Event, Video, Review, Breadcrumb, and Organization contexts.

capabilities.title: Duplicate-First Auto Fixes
capabilities.desc: Creates optimized duplicates, applies fixes safely, and gives before/after comparisons so you approve before publishing.

expected_findings: Missing or weak title tags
Missing or weak meta descriptions
Multiple H1 tags and skipped heading levels
Missing image alt text
Thin content pages
Broken internal links
Orphaned pages
Non-descriptive URL slugs

skills.name: WordPress AI Image Optimizer
skills.description: AI-powered image optimization that downloads images from WordPress, processes locally (compress, WebP conversion, resize, rename), uploads optimized versions, and updates all content references.
skills.author: Respira for WordPress

details.hero_subtitle: Optimize your entire image footprint with AI-powered local processing. Compress, convert, resize, rename, and update references in duplicate-first mode.

capabilities.title: Comprehensive Image Audit
capabilities.desc: Scans media library, posts, pages, featured images, builders, and WooCommerce product images for optimization opportunities.

capabilities.title: AI-Powered Local Processing
capabilities.desc: Downloads and processes images locally with ImageMagick, Sharp, or Pillow for compression, conversion, resizing, and renaming.

capabilities.title: Automated Upload & URL Updates
capabilities.desc: Uploads optimized files as new media entries and updates references across duplicates of affected pages/posts/builders.

capabilities.title: Safe & Reversible
capabilities.desc: Original files remain intact and flagged as deprecated, enabling low-risk rollout and rollback support.

expected_findings: Oversized images (5000px originals where 2000px max is enough)
Inefficient formats (PNG photos, oversized JPGs)
Missing or weak alt text
Non-SEO filenames (IMG_1234.jpg, screenshot.png)
Missing responsive sizes and srcset gaps
Suboptimal compression quality settings
Missing lazy loading or width/height attributes
Orphaned media not referenced by content

skills.name: Internal Link Builder
skills.description: Strategic internal link building for WordPress sites. Analyzes all published content, maps topic relationships, identifies high-value linking opportunities between pages, and presents a clear plan for approval before making any changes.
skills.author: Respira for WordPress

details.hero_subtitle: Strategic internal link building for WordPress. Scan all content, map topic relationships, find high-value linking opportunities, and apply with plan-first, duplicate-first safety.

capabilities.title: Content Relationship Mapping
capabilities.desc: Scans all pages and posts, extracts topics and keywords, and builds a complete map of how your content relates to each other.

capabilities.title: Opportunity Detection
capabilities.desc: Finds orphaned pages, missing contextual links, weak topic clusters, and hub pages that should link to sub-pages but don\

capabilities.title: Plan-First Approach
capabilities.desc: Presents every recommended link with source, target, anchor text, placement context, and reasoning — then waits for your approval.

capabilities.title: Duplicate-First Application
capabilities.desc: Creates optimized duplicates with links inserted, respecting your page builder format. Review before publishing.

skills.name: Content Portability
skills.description: Export WordPress pages, posts, and custom posts to portable local packages with builder data and media, then import to another site with smart ID remapping and auto-backup safety.
skills.author: Respira for WordPress

details.hero_subtitle: Back up your WordPress content to portable local packages. Migrate to another site with smart ID remapping. Auto-backup before AI edits.

capabilities.title: Portable Content Export
capabilities.desc: Export pages, posts, and custom post types with full builder data, meta, and hashes to a structured local package.

capabilities.title: Smart Import & Migration
capabilities.desc: Import content to another site with automatic ID remapping for media, posts, and builder JSON references.

capabilities.title: Auto-Backup Before Edits
capabilities.desc: Quick local backup mode saves a timestamped snapshot before any AI edit — zero-friction insurance.

capabilities.title: Diff Against Live Site
capabilities.desc: Compare local exports against current site state to see exactly what changed since your last backup.

expected_findings: Machine-Readable JSON — Full content, builder payload, allowlisted meta, and computed hashes for every page and post.
Human-Readable Markdown — Browse your backup in any text editor or GitHub — heading structure, text, and image references.
Optional Media Download — Download referenced images locally for fully portable offline packages.
Builder Data Preservation — Elementor, Bricks, Divi builder JSON exported alongside standard WordPress content.
Hash Verification — Content, builder, and meta hashes for every item — verify import fidelity automatically.
Package Manifest — Complete metadata: source site, WordPress version, content counts, warnings, and skipped items.
